CHAR 1 Continence in last 14 days: appliances and programs - external (condom) catheter. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
270 H3D H3D_INDWELL_CATH (H3D) Indwelling Catheter CHAR 1 Continence in last 14 days: appliances and programs - indwelling catheter. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
271 H3E H3E_INTERMIT_CATH (H3E) Intermittent Catheter CHAR 1 Continence in last 14 days: appliances and programs - intermittent catheter. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
272 H3F H3F_NOT_USE_TOLIET (H3F) Did Not
